markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and GrowthX team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Industry pages will be rewritten** to a 50/50 AI/human balance, moving from an AI-first focus to a customizable "ingredient" model.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Jo Kaminska is the new Engagement Manager,** leading strategy and analytics. Usman is Content Manager, and Maddy will no longer review editorial content due to workload.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [**The "AI Receptionist Knowledge Hub" will be rebranded** to an inclusive title (e.g., "Receptionist Knowledge Base") to attract a wider audience and compete with Synflow.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**The "Call Hub" page is approved for launch** after removing the distracting top carousel. The "Call Flow Design" cluster is a success, driving \>100 sessions in its first month.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Reorganization

  - [**Jo Kaminska → Engagement Manager**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Primary Smith.ai contact for strategy, analytics, and value alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [**Usman → Content Manager**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [Manages end-to-end content production, ensuring quality and native English spelling.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**Megan → Individual Contributor**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Focuses on high-level strategy; will join calls as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Analytics Development**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [New Q1 2026 project to build out monthly tracking, competitor analysis, and LLM tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Industry Page Strategy Shift

  - [**Problem:** Industry landing pages are too AI-focused, alienating users searching for general "virtual receptionist" services.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**New Strategy → 50/50 Balance**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [Position AI and human receptionists as customizable "ingredients" to solve business problems, not as separate products.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This reflects Smith.ai's customizable model, where clients can choose who handles what calls (e.g., AI for new leads, humans for clients) and add human support to AI plans for $3/call.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Ownership:** GrowthX will rewrite the pages. Product Marketing can refine them later.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
          - [Rewrite headers and copy to be product-agnostic.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
          - [Balance the FAQ section.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
          - [Add a technical module (e.g., call flow design) to showcase expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Visuals:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
          - [Use Figma for simple placeholder images to avoid launch delays.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
          - [Smith.ai will provide industry-specific demo players for Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

### Content Hub & Cluster Performance

  - [**"Call Hub" Page**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Decision:** Approved for launch after removing the distracting top carousel.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The page is not targeting top-tier keywords, so getting it live to capture traffic is the priority.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**"Call Flow Design" Cluster**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [**Performance:** A success, driving \>100 sessions with high engagement since its Nov 3 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [**Action:** Update all articles to link to both AI and Virtual Receptionist pages to reflect the new 50/50 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [**"AI Receptionist Knowledge Hub"**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Decision:** Rebrand the hub with an inclusive title (e.g., "Receptionist Knowledge Base") before launch.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current title is too narrow. A broader name will attract more traffic and compete directly with Synflow, a key competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

### Q1 2026 Priorities & Roadmap

  - [**Product Team Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [Adjusting underlying AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [Producing industry-specific demo players.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
      - [Developing features for enterprise/franchise customers and self-service onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [**Marketing Team Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [Continue go-to-market efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [Maddy will no longer review editorial content to unblock the publishing queue.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [Rewrite industry pages to a 50/50 AI/human balance.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [Rebrand the "AI Receptionist Knowledge Hub" with a broader title.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [Update "Call Flow Design" cluster articles to link to both AI and VR pages.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [Launch the "Call Hub" page.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [Reschedule the Dec 24 meeting to Dec 17.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [**Smith.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
      - [Deliver industry-specific demo players for Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/4nxuhpihoVapv8_CdCFTRmRcBHdSze7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
